race.description: Parkes Farm Centre / Pfd Food Services Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: The lightly raced filly DAWN ON ME (9) returned from a four-month spell last start with a stunning all-the-way win over this distance at the Sapphire Coast. Should ping to the lead again from the inside alley and can lead them a merry dance. RED LINE FEVER (11) turned in an eye-catching run when fresh from a spell over this trip at Dubbo a fortnight ago, coming from next to last on the bend to get up for second. Will have to go back again from the wide draw but she is capable of finishing right over the top. CUMNOCK (2) has struggled at his last couple of runs in better company over 1100m. Best form comes at 1000m and the drop in grade is welcomed. Can turn things around. DEMARCATE (3) is ready to peak after a flashing light run at Tamworth last time.
